statement.en: Etude du transfert potentiel de chlordécone de parcelles à parcelles par ruissellement et érosion

proposer: Jonathan Allongout, Thierry Bazajet, Rémi Bizeul et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a 2026-dated environmental/agrochemical study on chlordecone transfer mechanisms. The date is future-relative to training data cutoff (April 2024), making it a provisional/preprint-stage document. The research addresses empirical soil transport phenomena (measurable but context-dependent). The abstract is incomplete, preventing full technical evaluation. Classification as FLOWING reflects: (1) future publication date suggesting pre-validation status, (2) ongoing field research typical of environmental science, (3) incomplete information provided.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 土壌の毒性は勾配と流れの速さの幾何平均で逃げていく。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 毒物は斜面を下り、粒子に吸着し、水の流れとともに隣の畑へ染み出す。
